guestPrompt.title: You're doing great!

guestPrompt.benefit2: Track your scores across lessons and flashcards
guestPrompt.benefit3: Pick up right where you left off

home.heroSubtitle: Structured lessons, interactive flashcards, and progress tracking — all with native audio.

progress.title: Your <1>Progress</1>
progress.subtitle: Track your learning journey
progress.noActivities: No activities in this category yet.
progress.noStruggles: You're not struggling with anything right now. Keep it up!
progress.spacedRepetitionTip: Review flashcards regularly to improve retention
progress.activePracticeTip: Focus on struggling areas to improve faster
progress.stayConsistentTip: Study a little bit every day for best results
progress.analyticsTitle: What your activity is telling us
progress.analyticsSubtitle: Use this as a simple read on momentum, review pressure, and the next useful step.
progress.nextFocusBody: This area is showing the clearest signal for extra practice.

profilePage.voiceDescription: Choose a {{language}} voice for pronunciation. Your selection syncs across devices.
profilePage.noVoices: No {{language}} voices available on this device. Try using Chrome or Edge for more voice options.
profilePage.xpModeDescription: Choose how your XP system works. Challenge Mode adds XP decay for inactivity.
profilePage.relaxedDesc: No XP decay. Learn at your own pace.
profilePage.challengeDesc: XP decays after 48h of inactivity. Stay sharp!
profilePage.challengeWarning: Switching to Challenge Mode will reset your XP to 0. Your learning history will be preserved, but you'll start earning XP from scratch.
profilePage.challengeDetail: In Challenge Mode, your XP decays by 15% per day after 48 hours of inactivity. Only answering questions resets the timer.
profilePage.relaxedWarning: Your current XP will be preserved in Relaxed Mode. However, if you switch back to Challenge Mode in the future, your XP will be wiped to 0.
profilePage.resetProgressDesc: Reset your XP and answer history. Your XP will go back to 0 and all questions will award full points again.
profilePage.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your XP and answer history? Your XP will go back to 0.
profilePage.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
profilePage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
profilePage.challengeEnabled: Challenge Mode enabled! XP has been reset.
profilePage.relaxedEnabled: Switched to Relaxed Mode. Your XP is preserved.
profilePage.xpReset: XP and answer history reset successfully!
profilePage.personalizationDesc: Save approved words, phrases, and situations from real life so class, conversation, quiz, flashcards, and writing practice can become more relevant to you.
profilePage.voiceSettingsDesc: Choose separate voices for your target language and your native language so mixed replies are pronounced naturally.
profilePage.curriculumVersionDesc: Pick the version of the curriculum you want to use for each supported target language. You can switch any time.
profilePage.curriculumV2Desc: Pattern drills, stories, cloze, vocab SRS, pronunciation — planner-sequenced.
profilePage.curriculumV1Desc: Vocabulary lists and class lessons you already know.

admin.promoteConfirm: Promote {{username}} to admin? They will have full access to this dashboard.

contact.title: Tell us what you need

contact.subject: Subject

pricing.institutionalSubtitle: Institutional subscriptions sit beside individual plans. Members can receive Plus, Pro, or Premium-level access through their organization without changing their personal account.

planTaglines.free: Try the learning loop with daily limits.
planTaglines.plus: More daily conversation and device memory.
planTaglines.pro: Synced memory and personalization for serious learners.
planTaglines.ultra: Everything in Pro, ready for future premium learning tools.
planTaglines.institution_basic: Seats for groups that need guided learning and practice.
planTaglines.institution_pro: Synced learner memory, reports, and class management.
planTaglines.institution_enterprise: Custom onboarding, reporting, and commercial terms.

preview.title: Lesson overview
preview.goal: Preview the lesson and set a learning goal.
preview.task: Tell the tutor what you want to understand first.

learn.title: Guided explanation
learn.goal: Study the selected lesson item with the tutor.
learn.task: Ask for a simple explanation or example.

practice.title: Active practice
practice.goal: Use the target language in a short answer.
practice.task: Write or say one original answer using the lesson material.

review.title: Check understanding
review.goal: Review mistakes and summarize what you learned.
review.task: Summarize one thing you learned and one thing that is still unclear.

classLesson.loadError: Could not load this class lesson.
classLesson.savedReason: Saved from class for later practice.
classLesson.wrapUpBody: Review saved items, use them in conversation, or write them from memory while the lesson is still fresh.

fallback.shortAnswer: Try one short answer using this lesson item.
fallback.continue: Let us continue with the next part of the lesson.

classLesson.savedExampleReason: Saved class example for later practice.
classLesson.savedTutorReplyReason: Saved from a tutor reply for later practice.
classLesson.selfTestReason: Saved from class for a quick self-test.
classLesson.wrapUpReviewBody: Retry due or weak items from this class.

classLesson.wrapUpWritingBody: Use the level-appropriate write or type mode.

supportLevels.immersionWithHelp: Mostly target language with help available

quizModes.nativeAssisted: Meaning choices in your native language

classList.title: Learn with your tutor
classList.subtitle: Choose a structured class unit and move through vocabulary, grammar, dialogue, speaking, and writing with guided support.
classList.note: Built for guided lessons, not quick drills.
classList.emptyBody: Class lessons are being prepared for this language. Please check back soon.
classList.loadError: We couldn't load your lessons right now. Please check your connection and try again.

tracks.foundationSubtitle: Start here with the sound and writing system for {{language}}.
tracks.survivalSubtitle: Build practical basics for greetings, rooms, places, routines, shopping, and food.
tracks.everydaySubtitle: Core everyday lessons for greetings, food, places, plans, and daily situations.
tracks.bridgeSubtitle: Review and transition units that connect everyday material to more independent use.
tracks.thematicSubtitle: Topic-driven units for opinions, culture, health, plans, and confident everyday expression.
tracks.topicSubtitle: Topic-driven units for opinions, culture, health, plans, and confident everyday expression.
tracks.professionalSubtitle: Practical language for work, services, housing, safety, and formal situations.
tracks.grammarSubtitle: Longer reading, listening, speaking, and writing tasks with lighter native-language support.
tracks.advancedSubtitle: Longer reading, listening, speaking, and writing tasks with lighter native-language support.

classList.singleTrackGuidanceBody: This track is intentionally compact so the first step feels clear. Finish the class here, then move into the next track for broader practice.

contextPractice.title: Lessons shaped around you
contextPractice.lockedDesc: Pro and Premium can save approved words, phrases, and situations from real life so future practice feels more relevant. Free and Plus can continue using the regular lessons and conversation practice.
contextPractice.upgradeDesc: Upgrade when you want lessons, review prompts, and roleplays to adapt to the everyday language you approve.
contextPractice.subtitle: Capture a visible practice session, review the useful words and situations, then save only what you approve. Saved items help {{language}} class and conversation practice feel more relevant.
contextPractice.unsupportedSpeech: This browser does not support speech recognition. You can paste notes below instead.
contextPractice.transcriptPlaceholder: Captured transcript or notes appear here. Raw transcript is not saved unless you copy it somewhere yourself.
contextPractice.privacyNote: Raw audio is not stored. The transcript is used only for this analysis request.
contextPractice.emptyAnalysis: Analyze a session to see suggested topics, words, and phrases.
contextPractice.emptyRecommendations: Save personalization items to unlock roleplays, review drills, and class prompts.

conversation.speechUnavailableTitle: Speech input is not available in this browser
conversation.notAvailableTitle: Conversation Practice is not available on this plan.
conversation.notAvailableBody: Daily conversation practice is available on Free, Plus, and Pro.
conversation.savedReplyReason: Saved from conversation for later practice.
conversation.saveReplyFailed: Could not save this reply right now.
conversation.savedRoleplayReason: Completed roleplay saved for later practice.
conversation.saveRoleplayFailed: Could not save this roleplay right now.
conversation.recapReviewFallback: Save one phrase and reuse it in another practice mode.

exerciseHub.title: Choose an exercise
exerciseHub.subtitle: Practice with quizzes, review vocabulary with flashcards, or build handwriting memory.
exerciseHub.quizDesc: Work through lesson questions and check your understanding.
exerciseHub.flashcardsDesc: Review words and phrases until they feel familiar.
exerciseHub.writingDesc: Trace, copy, listen, recall by meaning, and keep a handwriting notebook.
exerciseHub.reviewDesc: Return to saved items, weak areas, and what is due today.

quizPage.subtitle: Choose a quiz and answer practice questions.

instructions.addToBegin: Add a word or sentence to begin.
instructions.trace: Trace over the guide, then clear and write from memory.
instructions.copy: Look carefully, then copy the word or sentence.
instructions.listen: Press Play, write what you hear, then reveal the answer.
instructions.stroke: Follow the guide, then use the writing area to practice.
instructions.review: Compare your writing with the answer and mark what was strong.
instructions.type: Type the answer from memory. This is the standard writing mode after the early handwriting lessons.

status.emptyNotebook: Add a word or open Class to fill your notebook.
status.savedComplete: Saved as complete. Moving to the next item.

strokeGuide.emptyMemory: Write it once more without the guide.
strokeGuide.hangul: {{index}}. {{char}}: top to bottom, left to right, keep the syllable block balanced.
strokeGuide.cjk: {{index}}. {{char}}: horizontal before vertical, top before bottom, outside before inside.
strokeGuide.default: {{index}}. {{char}}: copy the shape, then write it from memory.

writing.title: Writing practice
writing.subtitle: Trace, copy, listen, recall by meaning, study stroke order, and keep a notebook from your lessons.
writing.emptySource: No items in this source yet.
writing.recallTarget: Recall the target text from your notebook.

review.memory: I can write it from memory

writing.savedReason: Saved from writing practice for another pass.
writing.selfTestReason: Saved from writing practice for a quick self-test.

institution.title: Institution dashboard
institution.subtitle: Manage seats, review learner activity, and keep your organization profile current.
institution.noAccessBody: This area is for institution owners, managers, and teachers. Request institution access or contact us if you expected to see it.
institution.noNeedsHelpLearners: No learners currently need extra attention.
institution.allowedTargetLanguagesHelp: Learners using this institution access can choose only these target languages.
institution.allowLanguageRequests: Allow learners to request another language
institution.noGroupsYet: Create a group to manage language access for a class, cohort, or team.
institution.groupLanguagesHelp: Leave empty to use the organization policy, or select languages for this group only.
institution.certificateLogoInvalid: Use a PNG, JPG, or WebP logo under 600 KB.
institution.certificateLogoReadFailed: Could not read that logo file.
institution.certificateBrandingFailed: Could not save certificate branding. Use a PNG, JPG, or WebP logo under 600 KB.
institution.certificateBrandingHelp: Institution certificates use the same design as personal certificates, with this logo and institution name added.
institution.certificateLogoRequirement: Use a clean PNG, JPG, or WebP logo under 600 KB. Transparent logos usually look best.
institution.memberSuspended: {{name}} suspended — access continues until their seat expires.
institution.unsuspendNoSeats: No seats available — buy more before unsuspending.
institution.projectionWarningTitle: Heads up — learners will lose access soon.
institution.projectionWarning: {{count}} learners auto-renew in the next {{days}} days but you only have {{available}} seats. Top up to keep them learning.
institution.seatWalletHint: Each seat gives a learner 30 days of access once they start learning. Unused seats expire 365 days after purchase.
institution.noActiveBatches: No seat packs in the wallet yet. Top up to start.
institution.autoRenewTitle: Refill automatically when seats get low
institution.cardOnFile: Card on file — Stripe will charge when triggered.
institution.noCardOnFile: No card on file yet. Buy seats once via checkout to save a card.
institution.autoRenewThreshold: Trigger when available seats fall to or below
institution.noSeatHistory: No seats have been allocated to this learner yet.
institution.sampleCertificateFailed: Could not open the sample certificate.

institution.certificateLogoReady: {{fileName}} is ready to save. The certificate card shows how it will appear.

curriculumV2.noLessonsBody: Curriculum v2 content hasn't been seeded for your target language yet.
curriculumV2.sessionCompleteBody: You finished {{count}} lessons in about {{minutes}} minutes.

contrast.fallbackTitle: Why this is different in your language

minimalPair.title: Hear the difference
minimalPair.instructions: Tap each to hear it. Repeat both aloud.
minimalPair.listenInstructions: Tap each to hear it. After both, an ABX challenge starts.
minimalPair.abxReady: Ready when you are — listen and pick A or B.
minimalPair.whichOne: Which one did you just hear: A or B?

pattern.anchorInstructions: Read each example out loud once.
pattern.drillInstructions: For each filler above, produce a full sentence aloud.
pattern.aiUnavailable: Tutor feedback is not configured. Self-check your sentence against the anchor examples above.
pattern.aiNoParse: Tutor feedback returned an unclear response. Try again.
pattern.recoveryNoAnchors: Take another look at this pattern, then try again.
pattern.recoveryTitle: Let's revisit before you keep going.
pattern.recoveryPrompt: Which Korean sentence matches this English?

pronunciation.title: Listen, then repeat aloud
pronunciation.asrUnsupported: Speech recognition is not available in this browser. Use Chrome or Edge for pronunciation feedback.
pronunciation.noSpeech: I didn't catch that. Try again.
pronunciation.asrFallbackHint: Mic unavailable — repeat aloud and judge yourself.
pronunciation.aiUnavailable: Pronunciation scoring is not configured. Compare what you heard against the target above.
pronunciation.rateLimited: Too many speech checks recently — pause a moment.

story.questionInstructions: Answer each in your head or out loud.

vocabDeck.title: Slot fillers for this pattern
vocabDeck.description: These are the words you'll use to fill the pattern's slots. Recognize them now; their full review schedule appears in your flashcards.
vocabDeck.empty: This deck has no cards to review.

session.reviewsBanner: This session includes {{count}} review item(s) from your earlier sessions.
session.boostsBanner: {{count}} concept(s) surfaced from your recent practice context.

srs.prompt: How well did you know it?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.adminComposerHint: Send a system notice to one user, all users, or institution members.
notifications.institutionLearnerAddedBody: You have been added to {{organizationName}} as a learner.
notifications.institutionAdminAddedBody: You can now manage {{organizationName}} from your institution dashboard.
notifications.seatsAddedBody: {{quantity}} seats were added. {{remaining}} seats are now available.
notifications.institutionSeatRestoredBody: Your seat for {{organizationName}} is active again.
notifications.institutionRequestDeclinedBody: Your institution request for {{organizationName}} was declined.
notifications.xpDecayBody: {{penalty}} XP was reduced after inactivity. Your current total is {{totalXP}} XP.

stepUp.title: Confirm it's you
stepUp.message: For your security, please re-enter your password to continue with this action.

curriculumVersion.title: Choose your {{language}} experience
curriculumVersion.lede: We've launched a new {{language}} curriculum with pattern drills, comprehensible-input stories, and a session planner that adapts to what you've forgotten.
curriculumVersion.v2Body: Concept-first lessons across pattern drills, stories, cloze production, vocab SRS, and pronunciation tasks — interleaved by a session planner.
curriculumVersion.v1Body: Keep using the vocabulary lists and class lessons you know. You can switch any time from Settings.

hangul.skipConfirm: Skip Hangul onboarding? You can come back any time from the session header.
hangul.title: Read Korean
hangul.subtitle: Eight short lessons. Hear every letter, learn how blocks build syllables, then read real words.
hangul.practiceInstructions: Read each word aloud before peeking. Tap the speaker to compare.

catalog.notEnabled: Curriculum v2 is not enabled for your account yet.
catalog.title: Browse Korean lessons
catalog.subtitle: Every concept the planner can teach. Pick one to dive in, or let the system pick for you on the main Learn page.
